input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance

data.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
data.intent: The user wants a comprehensive view of their equity portfolio including holdings details, current profit/loss, sector breakdown, and year-to-date return trend.

decomposition.sub_question: What are the current stock holdings in my portfolio?
decomposition.title: Portfolio Holdings
decomposition.description: Detailed list of all current stock positions in the equity portfolio

decomposition.sub_question: What is the total daily profit and loss for my portfolio?
decomposition.title: Daily Profit & Loss
decomposition.description: Total monetary gain or loss for the portfolio today

decomposition.sub_question: How is my portfolio value distributed across sectors?
decomposition.title: Sector Allocation
decomposition.description: Percentage breakdown of portfolio value by industry sector

decomposition.sub_question: What is the portfolio performance trend year-to-date?
decomposition.title: YTD Performance
decomposition.description: Time-series trend of portfolio returns since the start of the year
